§ 1910.8 OMB control numbers under the Paperwork Reduction Act.
The following sections or paragraphs each contain a collection of information requirement which has been approved by the Office of Management and Budget under the control number listed. 29 CFR citation OMB control No. ------------------------------- 1910.7 1218-0147 1910.23 1218-0199 1910.27 1218-0199 1910.28 1218-0199 1910.66 1218-0121 1910.67(b) 1218-0230 1910.68 1218-0226 1910.95 1218-0048 1910.111 1218-0208 1910.119 1218-0200 1910.120 1218-0202 1910.132 1218-0205 1910.134 1218-0099 1910.137 1218-0190 1910.142 1218-0096 1910.145 1218-0132 1910.146 1218-0203 1910.147 1218-0150 1910.156 1218-0075 1910.157(e)(3) 1218-0210 1910.157(f)(16) 1218-0218 1910.177(d)(3)(iv) 1218-0219 1910.179(j)(2)(iii) and (iv) 1218-0224 1910.179(m)(1) and (m)(2) 1218-0224 1910.180(d)(6) 1218-0221 1910.180(g)(1) and (g)(2)(ii) 1218-0221 1910.181(g)(1) and (g)(3) 1218-0222 1910.184(e)(4), (f)(4) and (i)(8)(ii) 1218-0223 1910.217(e)(1)(i) and (ii) 1218-0229 1910.217(g) 1218-0070 1910.217(h) 1218-0143 1910.218(a)(2)(i) and (ii) 1218-0228 1910.252(a)(2)(xiii)( c ) 1218-0207
